    D

    DbSettings - Class in it.polimi.Game.Persistence
    Utility class responsible for loading MySQL persistence configuration.
    DECK - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.Constants.Position
    Position within the deck.
    disconnect() - Method in interface it.polimi.Network.Server.ClientConnection
    Closes the underlying connection.
    disconnect() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.ClientHandler
    Gracefully closes the underlying TCP socket connection.
    disconnect() - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiClientConnection
    Disconnects the client and removes listeners.
    disconnect(String) - Method in interface it.polimi.Network.RMI.GameServiceRemote
    Disconnects a player from the match.
    disconnect(String) - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.RMI.RmiGameService
    Disconnects a client by nickname and frees resources.
    disconnectPlayer(String) - Method in class it.polimi.Network.Server.Lobby
    Unregisters a player's connection (they go offline).
    doll - Enum constant in enum class it.polimi.Constants.InventorIcon
    Doll icon.
